action.reasoning: I've established a baseline with the initial training run. The model achieved 58.08% validation accuracy after 5 epochs of training only the classifier head. The training accuracy was around 81%, indicating some overfitting. Now I need to submit this model for evaluation to get the macro-F1 score, which is the primary metric. The training took about 28 minutes (1694 seconds), which gives me an idea of how much time I have left for further iterations.
